evals.prompt: What's it called when a popover seems to grow out of the button I clicked?
evals.expected_output: The precise glossary term and a concise definition, with close alternatives only if genuinely useful.
expectations: Uses the glossary definition rather than inventing a new term.
Does not expand into implementation or design advice.

evals.prompt: Implement an origin-aware popover animation in this React app.
evals.expected_output: Routes to the design implementation workflow rather than treating the request as terminology lookup.
expectations: Recognizes that the user wants implementation, not only a name.
Does not stop after defining origin-aware animation.
